name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: before 11:59 p.m. (sign on to a Green New Deal)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
body:
This one's really important to me.
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976a52/2ae112ef/1056399b/357ace99/3213145043/VEsH/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976a52/2ae112ef/1056399b/357ace99/3213145043/VEsE/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
Peter,
Our petition to demand a Green New Deal is closing soon, and we're still counting on 387 people to add their names before 11:59 p.m. tonight. We need transformative action to save our planet, and we have to confront the corporate greed and toxic lobbyist culture that's put us on the brink of no return.
**[Will you sign right now to join our call to transform our economy and save our planet?](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://act.kirstengillibrand.com/GND-survey?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk2811-ja-nd")**
[ADD YOUR NAME FOR A GREEN NEW DEAL](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://act.kirstengillibrand.com/GND-survey?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk2811-ja-nd")
---
Thank you so much for taking action.
Kirsten
[Contribute](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976a52/2ae112ef/1056399b/357ace9b/3213145043/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI4MTEtamEtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2811-ja-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee email list, please click here.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976a52/2ae112ef/1056399b/357ace9a/3213145043/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://gillibrand.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: Mary Mancini
subject: Send a message to Speaker Casada and tell him David Byrd must resign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
Peter,

State Representative David Byrd has been credibly accused of sexually abusing three former high school basketball players, who were aged 15 to 16 at the time. He even apologized to one victim.

But now he’s gotten a promotion – to chair the Tennessee House Education Administration Subcommittee.

Tennessee House Speaker Glen Casada gave Byrd the job, and has gone to bat for him over the accusations. He has called Byrd's victims "fake news." Glen Casada needs to hear our voices loud and clear.

Send a message to Speaker Casada now, and tell him Byrd must resign.

SPEAK UP

Just this week, a video captured Casada standing by Byrd, saying “If I was raped, I would move [out of town].”

This is unacceptable. We cannot have leaders who scoff at accusations and refuse to believe survivors, representing women and children in Tennessee – let alone chairing the Education Committee, which makes decisions affecting all children in this State.

We have to make Casada hear us loud and clear: Sexual assault is serious, and someone who has been repeatedly accused of abusing underage girls has no place making policy decisions for children.

Record a message to stand up for survivors, and get David Byrd out of power, and away from education.

Recording your message takes only 2 minutes, and we provide instructions that are easy to follow. If each of us records a video, we’ll be sending a powerful message Casada can’t ignore: Enoughis Enough for abusers in power!

Mary

--

Mary Mancini

Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE |
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Tennessee Democratic Party
1900 Church Street, Suite 203
Nashville TN 37203 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/mRJwV9M4Yh2RzjR_S0MFW_guqpB5aRfZtKluTHxD37Q=/U0BOHO1-NxGJlTmd5p6PfGV5uIhawaMPhV15aCjO938=.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
"The people of Venezuela are standing for freedom and democracy, and the United States of America is standing right by their side." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d8cef43e5c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [Trump Vows ‘New Day’ for Venezuela](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a8a62ef929&e=3ee4985eea)
-NBC News
“The people of Venezuela are standing for freedom and democracy, and the United States of America is standing right by their side,” President Donald J. Trump said on Monday at Florida International University in Miami. The President also addressed the American far left. “To those who want to try to impose socialism on the United States, we again deliver a very simple message: America will never be a socialist country.”
---
|
---
| [Border Apprehensions Jump 84 Percent, 606,000 Expected This Year](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=48c3334bb7&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“January saw a surprising surge of 22,000 more apprehensions of illegal immigrants at southwest border crossings over January 2018, prompting a key predictor to suggest that border officers will make over 600,000 apprehensions this year,” Paul Bedard reports. “The year-over-year increase was 84 percent, from 25,975 in January 2018 to 47,893 last January, according to U.S. Customs and Border Protection.”
---
|
---
| [An Illegal Immigrant Killed My Daughter. Trump's Right—We Must Complete the Border Wall.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8302922045&e=3ee4985eea)
-_USA Today_
Retired educator Dan Ferguson writes that his beloved daughter Mandy, a 28-year-old sixth-grade teacher, was killed last year by a criminal who should never have been in the United States. “In his declaration of a national emergency on our southern border, President Trump recognized the Americans who experienced the consequences of that emergency firsthand: angel moms and dads. I never expected I would be one of them.”
---
|
---
| [Trump Officially Directs Pentagon to Create Space Force Legislation for Congress](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b0654064ff&e=3ee4985eea)
-CNBC
“President Donald Trump signed a directive on Tuesday that ordered the Department of Defense create a Space Force as a sixth military branch,” Michael Sheetz and Amanda Macias report. “The directive orders the Pentagon draft legislation for Congress that would create the Space Force as a part of the U.S. Air Force.” This move sets in motion the creation of America’s first new military branch in more than 70 years.
---
|
---
| [Ivanka Trump Examines UPS Training at Facility in Gwinnett](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7b0507351a&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Atlanta Journal-Constitution_
Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump toured a UPS driver training facility in Duluth, Georgia, with Gov. Brian Kemp (R-GA) on Wednesday, detailing the Trump Administration’s focus on workforce development. Last year, UPS “signed a pledge in support of President Trump’s workforce development initiative, committing to offer opportunities for career advancement to more than 50,000 employees.”
---
|
---
| [Opinion: Trump Stays Tough on Socialism](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ec18ebc150&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Detroit News_
“President Trump’s speech Monday afternoon in Miami wasn’t just directed at Nicolas Maduro and the socialists of Venezuela — it was also a stark reminder to left-leaning Americans that socialism's days are ‘numbered,’” Lt. Col. Tony Shaffer writes. “As Democrats rally around radical proposals such as ‘Medicare-for-all,’ free college tuition, enormous minimum wage increases, and even guaranteed basic income, it was President Trump’s responsibility to remind us that socialism’s sweeping promises are always empty.”
---
|
---
| [Lower Tax Refunds Show How the Republican Tax Cut is Keeping Money in Your Hands All Year](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6c81101723&e=3ee4985eea)
-_USA Today_
Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) and Rep. Kevin Brady (R-TX) explain that tax refunds are lower today because taxes are lower—keeping more money in Americans’ hands all year long. First, Democrats were wrong that tax cuts would hurt our economy. Now, they are “peddling the scary elixir that ‘lower tax refunds mean higher taxes.’ Wrong again . . . This claim about refunds, as the Washington Post’s fact checker observed, is ‘nonsensical and misleading.’”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=637034bf21&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8b1c36fc08&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=fd332796e8)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Just like old times
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
It was like old times.

Last weekend Chris, Cynthia and I were in a rental car driving from town
to town, meeting new people, eating fast food and learning the stories
that inspire and move us forward.

Only this time, outside of Texas.

I had been invited to speak to the U.S. Hispanic Leadership Institute
(USHLI) in Chicago. A huge honor, and I was excited to meet the thousands
of young people who were there to share their vision for the future of the
country. But, not having spent much time in the Midwest, I was also
interested in going to places I hadn’t been before.

Friday, we drove from Chicago to Milwaukee and spent time with about 20
students from the Milwaukee Area Technical College (MATC). The
conversation was powerful — we talked about anything that any student
wanted to raise, very often in personal terms.

One man shared with us his challenge with opioid addiction and recovery. A
young mother talked about raising her 10-year old daughter and attending
school at the same time. She shared that she was having a hard time
getting a job, “not even at a Starbucks!” because of a prior conviction on
her record. Another man pursuing software programming talked about what it
was like to lose a good friend to gun violence.

In these — and in so many other stories I heard — I learned about how
tough circumstances didn’t have to define opportunity and possibility. It
became clear just how crucial the access to a great education at MATC was
to their ability to transcend obstacles and overcome challenges in their
lives.

After the formal part of the meeting, I talked to a man who was starting
his second business. We talked about next steps, including access to
capital and attracting and retaining the talent necessary to ensure this
next venture did even better than the first. This then led to a
conversation with the woman standing next to him, who is starting a career
as a recording engineer, explaining to me how difficult it is to break
into the industry in Chicago. So she’s going to invest the time at MATC
and her talent in Milwaukee to make it big at home.

Everyone talked about how transformational MATC was for them and what it
meant for the larger community, where 35,000 attend one of the four MATC
campuses.

I left impressed, ever more convinced of the extraordinary value of
community and technical colleges.

From Milwaukee we drove to Madison, the sun beginning to set as we pulled
into town. Coming from El Paso, it’s so amazing and unusual and beautiful
to see the frozen ponds and lakes with people skating, playing hockey,
just having fun outside. The snow banked up on the side of the road so you
feel like you’re driving through tunnels at times.

We were met by Eliana and Isaac, students who organized a town-hall style
conversation. We had the good problem of more students than chairs so we
were able to broadcast the meeting to a couple of overflow rooms on
campus.

The conversation was intense and wide-ranging. Climate. Health care.
Middle East. Economy. Democracy. On this point, everything seemed to come
together for me. Because it’s hard to see how we address any of the super
huge challenges before us — like keeping the planet from warming another
1.5 degrees Celsius — without a fully engaged, informed democracy. We need
the genius, talent and participation of everyone, especially young
people.

So we talked about removing the barriers to participation — voter I.D.
Laws, gerrymandering, PACs and Super PACs, the electoral college, etc —
and reminded ourselves of the responsibility to own this democracy
together. To find common cause and common purpose, to remind ourselves
that we are the government, to act as though the future depends on us,
because it does.

We stayed to talk individually, take pictures, learn some of the secrets
of Wisconsin. Where can I get cheese curds?

An hour later we were in Edgerton at the largest Culver’s in the world.
With help from Bella who took our order, I left with a bag of cheese
curds, crinkle-cut fries, cheddar dipping sauce and a chocolate malt.
Luckily I had brought some lactaid with me from El Paso.\

The next day I had the chance to join thousands of young people from
across the country at the USHLI convention — the motto was "Defend
Democracy: Aquí y Ahora."

Got to listen to a lot of great speakers, from Mayor Yulin from San Juan,
to Rep. Celina Villanueva, to Congresswoman Deb Haaland to USHLI president
Dr. Juan Andrade, and most special of all I got to spend some time talking
with Dolores Huerta.

I had an opportunity to address the audience, choosing to speak about El
Paso’s story and the U.S.-Mexico border. The civil rights stands that we
are making today that are inspired by the great civil rights victories of
the generations before ours.

And how, whether back then or today, those civil rights struggles are
almost always led by the youngest Americans. They are the ones who
galvanize public opinion, command the conscience of the country, and
ultimately force people in positions of public trust to make the important
decisions on our behalf. Whether it was the Civil Rights and Voting Rights
Acts of more than 50 years ago — or the effort to end family separation,
close down the Tornillo children’s detention camp or free Dreamers from
fear of deportation today —— the politicians may get credit, but it is the
young who ensure the change happens.

We had time to stay around for a while afterwords, catch up with friends
we’ve met along the way (go Oklahoma Panhandle State Aggies!), meet new
ones, and then drive back to the airport to catch a plane to El Paso.

A short trip, but an inspiring one for me — lots of good people out there,
doing amazing work and ensuring this country lives up to its promise.
Thanks to everyone who took the time to say hello and welcome us!

Gracias,

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/16830?t=1001&akid=24946%2E444211%2EIzc-_w ]Follow Beto on Facebook »

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/16831?t=1002&akid=24946%2E444211%2EIzc-_w ]Follow Beto on Twitter »

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20190223footer&t=1003&refcode2=24946_444211_Izc-_w&akid=24946%2E444211%2EIzc-_w

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1004&akid=24946%2E444211%2EIzc-_w

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Tina Smith
subject: An all-out attack on our health and our rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
This is urgent.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-february?refcode=rtw_20190223_em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto") BREAKING: The Trump administration just issued a gag rule that threatens millions of people's access to essential reproductive health services. **We must do everything in our power to stop this. Join me in fighting back against this attack on our health and our rights by adding your name now.** **[SIGN THE PETITION](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4dfe9/c1f7015/6174efca/11400bb8/296742480/VEsF/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201902_gag-rule-ld?source=rtw_20190223_em-ld")** Friend, The Trump administration just introduced a gag rule that threatens millions of people's access to essential reproductive health services and attacks providers like Planned Parenthood. **As the first and only Senator to have worked for Planned Parenthood, I will never shy away from defending a woman's right to reproductive freedom. This gag rule is an all-out attack on our health and our rights. Friend, are you ready to join me in fighting back?** **[Add your name now to reject the Trump administration's gag rule and protect reproductive health services for millions of Americans:](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4dfe9/c1f7015/6174efca/11400bb8/296742480/VEsA/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201902_gag-rule-ld?source=rtw_20190223_em-ld")** [SIGN THE PETITION](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4dfe9/c1f7015/6174efca/11400bb8/296742480/VEsB/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201902_gag-rule-ld?source=rtw_20190223_em-ld") The Trump administration's gag rule:
* Effectively dismantles Title X, which ensures low-income people can access birth control and other essential reproductive health care.
* Prevents health care providers from informing patients about their full range of reproductive health options.
* Blocks millions of patients from accessing care at Planned Parenthood.

**[We need 5,000 signatures by midnight tonight to fight back against the Trump administration's gag rule. Add your name right now -- we can't do this without you.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4dfe9/c1f7015/6174efca/11400bb8/296742480/VEsP/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201902_gag-rule-ld?source=rtw_20190223_em-ld")** Let's go, Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-february?refcode=rtw_20190223_em-biobox&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4dfe9/c1f7015/6174efca/11400bba/296742480/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: Sherrod Brown
subject: your piece of the pie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Eighty percent of American workers live paycheck-to-paycheck. A minimum-wage worker can't afford rent on a two-bedroom apartment _anywhere in the country._ That's appalling. When policies reward wealth over work, this is what happens. Corporate profits and executive pay go up. Workers don't get the benefits they deserve, and their wages remain flat. The rich get richer while those who put in the work to drive our economy get left behind. As one newspaper put it: "When it comes to dividing up the pie, most American workers today have little or no say. **The pie is growing but they 're getting only the crumbs."** [**I want to build a system where anyone can get ahead -- no matter where they live or what job they do. That's what my Dignity of Work agenda is all about. Show your support for it now by adding your name.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc27/4462dc26/8e7d99b8/201edb2c/108994960/VEsH/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e190223m") For our policies to honor the dignity of work and support workers, we need to:
* Raise the minimum wage.
* Ensure workers are paid for overtime.
* Pass equal pay laws.
* Make it easier for workers to join a union.

Hard work should pay off. Workers shouldn't be getting crumbs -- they should be getting wages that pay their bills and allow them to build a future for their family. [**Add your name to show your support for the Dignity of Work agenda.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc27/4462dc26/8e7d99b8/201edb2c/108994960/VEsE/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e190223m") With gratitude, Sherrod
---

|
---
[www.sherrodbrown.com](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc27/4462dc26/8e7d99b8/201edb23/108994960/VEsF/ "https://www.sherrodbrown.com/")
| | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Can I explain?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
With just a few days left until we close the books for February, I am reaching out with a modest request. My team is telling me we’re behind on the internal fundraising goals we set for our campaign this month. That’s why, in a moment, I am going to ask you to make a grassroots donation to our campaign for president. But first, I hope you will let me explain why it is so important. Our campaign is not taking a dime from corporate PACs or lobbyists -- and that was a very deliberate choice. Yes, it means we are leaving money on the table. But that’s ok with me. **I never want there to be any question about whether I’m listening to the people or corporate lobbyists. The answer will always be _the people_.** However, this means we need to raise that money in other ways -- often with the help of people who donate to emails just like this one. Grassroots contributions aren’t just sustaining our movement: they’re powering it. Right now, this race is wide open. The choices we make now in these early months will set the tone and pace for the rest of our campaign. And I am running to win -- so we are pushing this team as hard as we can, because there is just no other option. That is why I’m asking: **Can I count on you to make a contribution to help reach our end-of-month fundraising goal? I wouldn't ask if your support didn't make a difference:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-190223?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190223-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&t=1&refcode2=3230_5755789_ycp4_B&akid=3230%2E5755789%2Eycp4_B)
---
| [Chip in $25 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-190223?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190223-full&amount=25&express_lane=true&t=2&refcode2=3230_5755789_ycp4_B&akid=3230%2E5755789%2Eycp4_B)
---
| | [Chip in $50 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-190223?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190223-full&amount=50&express_lane=true&t=3&refcode2=3230_5755789_ycp4_B&akid=3230%2E5755789%2Eycp4_B)
---
| [Chip in $100 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-190223?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190223-full&amount=100&express_lane=true&t=4&refcode2=3230_5755789_ycp4_B&akid=3230%2E5755789%2Eycp4_B)
---
| | [Chip in $250 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-190223?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190223-full&amount=250&express_lane=true&t=5&refcode2=3230_5755789_ycp4_B&akid=3230%2E5755789%2Eycp4_B)
---
| [Another Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-190223?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190223-full&t=6&refcode2=3230_5755789_ycp4_B&akid=3230%2E5755789%2Eycp4_B)
---
If we are going to make history in 2020, falling short of this goal is simply not an option. But I know that, with your help, we will get there.
As always, I’m deeply grateful for everything you do.
Thank you,
— Kamala Harris

PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). You received this message because you are subscribed to Senator Kamala Harris' mailing list.
You can [adjust your email preferences here](https://action.kamalaharris.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=7&akid=3230%2E5755789%2Eycp4_B), or [unsubscribe from receiving further emails here.](https://action.kamalaharris.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3230%2E5755789%2Eycp4_B)
